texts: The archaeologist unearthed Byzantine mosaics near the aqueduct, yet the stratigraphy suggested earlier Phoenician trade routes. Meanwhile, algorithmic bias in recommender systems remains a subtle but pervasive challenge for engineers worldwide.

Neuroplasticity can surprise you: deliberate practice reshapes motor maps, and sleep consolidates fragile gains into durable skill. The hard part is consistency, not intensity, when learning something genuinely new.
A distributed ledger is not magic; it is a replicated append-only log with consensus rules, latency tradeoffs, and operational burdens that teams underestimate until they operate one in production.
